topic: Theme 3: Communication and the World Around Us
subject: spanish

items.why: Classic false friend — 'actually' is 'en realidad'; actualmente refers to the present time.

items.q: 'Fui' is the preterite of which verb(s)?
items.correct: Both ir (I went) and ser (I was) — the forms are identical.
items.why: Ir and ser share exactly the same preterite forms, which surprises students who learned 'fui = I went' first.

items.q: Which is correct for 'I travelled to Italy'?
items.why: Students use 'en' (in) for the destination, but movement towards a place takes 'a'.

items.random_wrong: I will go to the beach.
items.why: Correct answer: I went to the beach.. “He went to the beach.” sounds right because it borrows the language of the topic — but it fails this question. Re-read the notes on why.

items.q: How do you say 'I am going to travel to Spain'?
items.why: The answer examiners want is: Voy a viajar a España.. “Vaya viajado a España.” is the distractor this question was built around — if it tempted you, that's the exact gap to close.
Correct answer: To download. “To discharge a battery” sounds right because it borrows the language of the topic — but it fails this question. Re-read the notes on why.
The answer examiners want is: La contaminación. “El reciclaje” is the distractor this question was built around — if it tempted you, that's the exact gap to close.

items.q: 'Pasé dos semanas en España.' How many days is that?
items.why: The real figure is 14 days. The wrong options cluster deliberately close — anchor the exact number to one concrete fact so it can't drift.
